title: Auto Number column cannot be fetched from API
excerpt: Tried using column_values or when creating an item, got nothing in the response, as if the column doesn’t exist

posts.author: amitozalvo (Amit Ozalvo)
posts.cookedHtml: Tried using column_values or when creating an item, got nothing in the response, as if the column doesn’t exist

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @amitozalvo – that is correct. Currently the Auto Number column is not supported by the API, because it does not exist in our database. Instead, it is calculated and displayed in your browser when you open your board.

We are working on adding these to the API but it will require major infrastructural changes, so I cannot give you an ETA on when it will be available.
